hero.headline: The Leading Padel Platform in Israel
hero.subheadline: Find courts, manage tournaments, and run your club in one comprehensive app.

features.title: Everything in One Place
features.booking_desc: View real-time availability and book courts with a click, including Google Maps navigation.
features.tournaments_desc: Register for local tournaments, track bracket stages, and play to win.
features.ranking_desc: Improve your skill rating with Rally's unique dynamic ELO system.
features.payments_desc: Pay directly from the app securely and quickly with leading Israeli payment gateways.

crm_features.title: Smart CRM for Clubs
crm_features.dashboard_desc: Control all your courts from one intuitive interface.
crm_features.revenue_desc: Track income and activity data to maximize your club's profits.
crm_features.users_desc: Easily manage player profiles, match history, and memberships.
crm_features.automated_desc: Save time with smart billing, eco-friendly invoices, and receipts.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro1: This Privacy Policy (hereinafter: the "Privacy Policy") is an integral part of the Terms of Use of the "Rally Padel" platform and should be read together with the Terms of Use, using the definitions therein.
privacy.intro2: The Operator, Rally Padel 770 Ltd., Company No. 517325106 (hereinafter: the "Operator" and/or "Rally Padel"), is committed to respecting the privacy of users of its website and application. To enhance user privacy protection, the Operator publishes this Privacy Policy and provides information about the options available to the user during use of the platform and regarding the Operator's practices concerning data collection within the service.
privacy.general_p1: As part of using the website and/or application services, the user will be asked to provide personal details to the Operator, including, but not limited to, full name, phone number, email address, location (optional), preferred courts (optional), and additional profile details, intended for service registration, creating a user account, providing access to the personal area, reserving and booking padel courts, registering for tournaments, coordinating matches, finding players, calculating player ranking, and providing access to the personal area. This information will be stored and processed for operational, internal, and service purposes, including for providing the service, contacting the user, support, service improvement, player ranking calculation, and future communication with the user. The information is collected through the website and/or application and may also be stored and processed in certain external systems. Payment method details, if requested for court reservations, tournament registration, and/or product purchases, are required solely for payment completion and are not fully stored by the Operator, but rather as an encrypted Token with the payment processor, unless explicitly stated otherwise.
privacy.general_p2: During use of the website and/or application, data may accumulate about the user's usage patterns. The collected information may include, among other things, activity and usage patterns, court reservation history, tournament registrations, match results, player ranking, usage dates and durations, pages and screens viewed, actions performed, IP address, device identifier, operating system type, browser type, technical usage data, location data (subject to consent), usage preferences, and usage habits. This information is used, among other things, for operational, statistical, research, marketing, and advertising purposes, for service improvement, player ranking calculation, player matching, and court recommendations, and a significant portion of it does not personally identify the user.
privacy.general_p3: The website and application operate, among other things, using Artificial Intelligence (AI) technologies and language models (LLM). As part of the user's interaction with the service, and for the purpose of calculating the player's ranking using an algorithm based on wins, win streaks, opponents defeated, and additional parameters, providing court recommendations, player matching, generating insights, statistical analyses, and improving user experience, the system collects, stores, and records information that the user voluntarily provides during use of the service.
privacy.general_p4: This information may include, among other things, user details, match history and results, wins and losses, information entered during profile creation, preferred courts, location (subject to user permission), player ranking, opponents played, tournaments participated in, usage preferences, chat and community messages, correspondence with the Operator, correspondence with court owners and other users, and any other personal detail the user chooses to enter or upload to the system voluntarily.
privacy.general_p5: Additionally, during use of the website and/or application, additional technical and operational information may accumulate, including usage patterns, access times, actions performed, products and/or content the user was interested in, IP address, device type, device identifiers, browser type, and additional system data. This information is used for the Operator's operational purposes, including for routine service operation, security, fault prevention, user experience improvement, and website and/or application performance improvement, and a significant portion of it does not personally identify the user.
privacy.general_p6: The use of the system is intended for reserving and booking padel courts, registering for tournaments, coordinating matches, finding players, calculating personal ranking, receiving statistical analyses and general recommendations, and for using ancillary services provided by the Operator within the website and/or application, including chats and communities. It is clarified that the rankings, analyses, insights, and recommendations presented within the service are based, among other things, on technological means and artificial intelligence mechanisms, and are provided for informational, personal tracking, and illustrative purposes only and do not constitute an official professional or sporting assessment. Sensitive, intimate, medical, biometric, financial, or any other confidential information should not be uploaded to the service unless expressly required for service operation. The system is not designed for storing secrets or sensitive information, and the user should exercise discretion when uploading content to the service. It is clarified that all information, content, match history, and any other data uploaded to the system by the user, including match results, rankings, chat and community messages, may be documented, stored, and processed by the Operator and/or by its service providers, including technology and AI providers, for the purpose of service provision, player ranking calculation, player matching, monitoring, maintenance, security, and service improvement. The user acknowledges that content uploaded to the system may be accessible to the Operator and said providers for these purposes.
privacy.database_intro: The data collected about the user as mentioned above is stored in the Operator's database. The Operator undertakes to use such information in accordance with this Privacy Policy and/or applicable law for the following purposes:
privacy.database_li1: Service provision: creating and managing the user account, reserving and booking padel courts, registering for tournaments, coordinating matches, finding similarly-ranked players, calculating the player's ranking using an AI-based algorithm, displaying match history and results, providing personalized recommendations for courts and players, displaying personal information to the user, providing access to chats and communities, and providing support services;
privacy.database_li2: Service and model improvement: using information, content, match history, results, usage data, and interaction data for service operation, user experience improvement, improving the accuracy, quality, and performance of algorithms (including the player ranking algorithm), models, and systems of the Operator and/or its service providers, all subject to applicable law;
privacy.database_li3: Documentation, monitoring, and security: preserving usage history, data, content, match results, rankings, and history uploaded to the system for documentation, security, fraud prevention, prevention of ranking system manipulation, monitoring, quality control, troubleshooting, and service and user experience improvement;
privacy.database_li4: Statistics and analysis: processing, analyzing, and delivering statistical, aggregated, or anonymous information that does not personally identify the user to third parties, including for business, research, operational, and marketing purposes;
privacy.database_li5: Enforcing the Operator's Terms of Use, preventing prohibited use of the service, and protecting the Operator's legal and contractual rights;
privacy.database_li6: Any other purpose specified in the Terms of Use, this Privacy Policy, and/or as required by applicable law.
privacy.marketing_intro: User details provided by the user shall be subject to the Operator's Privacy Policy, and the user acknowledges that the information provided and/or collected about them will be stored in the Operator's database for the following purposes:
privacy.marketing_li1: Marketing, advertising, sales promotion, and contacting the user through any legally permitted means, including direct mail and various communication channels, in connection with the Operator's services, padel courts, tournaments, updates, benefits, promotions, innovations, professional padel content, and additional content that may interest the user;
privacy.marketing_li2: Loyalty encouragement, statistical analysis and research, conducting surveys, examining user preferences, adapting services, products, and content for users, and any other use related to service registration and use;
privacy.marketing_li3: Internal, service, and operational needs, such as inquiry clarification, complaint handling, responding to user requests, monitoring, internal enforcement, risk management, and troubleshooting;
privacy.marketing_li4: Operational, marketing, research, and statistical needs, including information processing, analysis, segmentation, and sending direct mail subject to user consent and applicable law;
privacy.marketing_li5: Providing services to the user, managing the relationship, completing requested actions, and ensuring proper, fair, and lawful operation of the service.
privacy.marketing_p1: The user acknowledges that there is no legal obligation to provide the information, and it is provided voluntarily and with consent. However, providing certain information may be required for registration, use of certain services, court reservations, tournament registration, match coordination, ranking calculation, access to chats and communities, and/or completing purchases. The Operator may, for the purposes listed above and subject to applicable law, transfer from time to time non-identified, anonymous, or aggregated information regarding user activity within the website and/or application to entities partnering with the Operator, court owners, service providers, consultants, and any entity providing the Operator with services related to service operation.
privacy.marketing_p2: In accordance with the user's lawful consent, the Operator may contact the user from time to time with direct mail for offers, tournament updates, event invitations, court promotions, padel content, benefits, and information related to the Operator's services, products, and activities, via email, SMS, push notifications, social media, and/or phone, as long as no opt-out or unsubscribe notice has been received from the user, in accordance with applicable law.
privacy.thirdparty_title: Disclosure of Information to Third Parties
privacy.thirdparty_intro: The following are circumstances under which the Operator may share user information with third parties:
privacy.thirdparty_li1: To service providers, subcontractors, cloud providers, infrastructure providers, payment processors, mailing service providers, support providers, information security providers, data analytics providers, technology and AI providers, and padel court owners, as necessary for service operation, provision, and improvement, including for transmitting booking details, confirming reservations, payments, and tournament registrations;
privacy.thirdparty_li2: When the user has authorized the Operator to transfer their personal details to third parties, or has requested the Operator to perform an action involving such information transfer;
privacy.thirdparty_li3: In the event the user violates the website's Terms of Use or attempts to perform actions contrary to law;
privacy.thirdparty_li4: To enforce Terms of Use or other agreements or policies;
privacy.thirdparty_li5: In response to a subpoena or other investigative demand, court order, or a request for cooperation from a law enforcement or governmental authority;
privacy.thirdparty_li6: To establish or exercise the Operator's legal rights;
privacy.thirdparty_li7: To defend against legal claims as required by law. In such cases, the Operator may raise or waive any objection or right at its sole discretion;
privacy.thirdparty_li8: When the Operator believes disclosure is appropriate in connection with efforts to investigate, prevent, report, or take other action regarding illegal activity, suspected fraud, or other wrongdoing;
privacy.thirdparty_li9: To protect the rights, property, or safety of the Operator, its employees, website users, or others;
privacy.thirdparty_li10: In connection with a material corporate transaction, such as a sale of the Operator's business, divestiture, merger, consolidation, or asset sale, or in the event of liquidation.
privacy.aggregated_p1: The Operator may use aggregated and non-personal information it has collected in any of the circumstances described above. The Operator may combine non-personal information it has collected with additional non-personal information collected from other sources. The Operator may also share aggregated information with third parties, including consultants, advertisers, and investors, for general business analysis purposes. For example, the Operator may report to its advertisers the number of website users, the most viewed products, and more. Such information does not include any personal information and may be used to develop content and services that will benefit the user and to customize content and advertising.
privacy.ai_title: Third Parties and Use of Artificial Intelligence
privacy.ai_p1: Within the use of the website and for creating visualizations through the system at the user's request, there are several places on the website where the user can click on a link to access links to websites not subject to this Privacy Policy and not affiliated with the Operator. These links may independently request and/or collect information from the user, including personal information, and in some cases provide the Operator with information about the user's activity on those links.
privacy.ai_p2: Any third party to which the Operator may disclose personal information pursuant to this Privacy Policy may have its own privacy policy describing how it uses and discloses personal information. Such policies will govern the use, handling, and disclosure of the user's personal information after the Operator has shared it with said third parties as described in this Privacy Policy. For additional information about the privacy policies of those third parties, the Operator encourages you to visit their respective links.
privacy.ai_p3: The Operator may allow third parties, including its authorized service providers, vendors, advertising companies, and advertising networks, to display advertisements on the website and/or application. These entities may use tracking technologies such as Cookies, SDKs, pixels, unique identifiers, and similar means to collect information about users who view or interact with the content, service, or advertisements. The use of these technologies by such third parties is subject to their own privacy policies, not the Operator's Privacy Policy.
privacy.ai_p4: The service is based, among other things, on artificial intelligence technologies and may use application programming interfaces (APIs), cloud services, data processing tools, analytics engines, ranking calculation models, and/or services of local and international third-party providers, including AI providers (hereinafter: "Service Providers").
privacy.ai_p5: When using the service, information entered by the user, match history, results, rankings, location (subject to consent), correspondence, and information required for player ranking calculation, providing recommendations, player matching, service operation, and/or any other need related to service provision, may be automatically transferred to servers and/or systems of the Service Providers for processing, storage, analysis, output generation, and service maintenance. Use of the service constitutes consent to such transfer and processing, subject to applicable law.
privacy.ai_p6: The user acknowledges that some Service Providers, including AI providers, may use information, content, match history, results, and data transferred to them for service provision, quality control, security, maintenance, improving their services, and/or training and improving their models and systems (including player ranking models), subject to their own policies and applicable law. Additionally, the Operator may use such information for improving, training, and refining its service, systems, algorithms, and models, all subject to applicable law. Therefore, it is recommended not to upload sensitive, confidential, intimate, or other information to the service that the user does not wish to be processed within the service. The Operator uses, to the extent possible, services, interfaces, and providers operating under accepted information security standards. However, since some information is processed and/or stored on systems and servers not under the Operator's control, including outside of Israel, absolute immunity from exposure, unauthorized access, or security risks at those providers cannot be guaranteed. The Operator may collect location data from the user's mobile device, subject to the user's express consent. Location data is used for finding nearby padel courts, court recommendations, improving user experience, and displaying relevant content. The user may revoke location permission at any time through device or application settings. Where the user participates in chats and communities within the platform, conversation content, messages, and correspondence may be stored in the Operator's systems for documentation, monitoring, security, and Terms of Use enforcement purposes. The Operator takes reasonable security measures to protect conversation privacy, including encryption of communications, but cannot guarantee absolute protection. Chats may be encrypted at the Transport Layer but are not necessarily end-to-end encrypted unless otherwise stated. It is recommended not to share sensitive personal information in chats or communities.
privacy.choices_title: User Choices Regarding Information Collection and Use
privacy.choices_p1: The user may choose not to provide the Operator with certain information; however, this may result in the inability to use certain features of the website, as such information is required to use the Operator's services, including court reservations, tournament registration, ranking calculation, match coordination, and access to chats and communities.
privacy.choices_p2: When the user registers for the service and consents to receive direct mail, the Operator shall be entitled, subject to applicable law, to send direct mail, emails, text messages, system notifications, service notices, tournament updates, padel event invitations, alerts, surveys, marketing content, service updates, information about courts, products, benefits, and special offers. If the Operator has already disclosed user information to a third party lawfully before the user changed preferences or updated information, the user may need to update preferences directly with that third party, as applicable.
privacy.chats_p1: The platform may offer direct chat services between users, groups, and/or communities for padel players. The Operator does not actively monitor the content of conversations in chats and communities, and does not review, filter, or verify content posted by users. Responsibility for chat content lies solely with the users.
privacy.chats_p2: The Operator takes reasonable security measures to protect conversation privacy, including encryption of communications between users. However, the Operator cannot guarantee absolute protection against unauthorized access or information leaks. It is clarified that chats may be encrypted at the Transport Layer (Transport Layer Encryption) but are not necessarily end-to-end encrypted (End-to-End Encryption) unless otherwise stated.
privacy.chats_p3: The Operator may remove offensive, inciting, degrading, or law-violating content at its sole discretion and without prior notice. The Operator may block a user from accessing chats and communities without prior notice.
privacy.chats_p4: The Operator is not responsible for any damage arising from content posted by users in chats and communities, including defamation, fraud, deception, emotional harm, or any other damage. It is recommended not to share sensitive personal information (such as ID numbers, credit card details, full home address, etc.) in chats or communities.
privacy.courts_p1: The Operator may transfer to padel court owners necessary information for service provision, including details of the user who reserved the court (name, phone, email), booking details, dates, payment details, and prior booking history, to the extent required for confirming the reservation, operating the court, and providing the service to the user.
privacy.courts_p2: Court owners undertake to maintain the confidentiality of the information provided to them and to use it solely for the purpose of providing the service to the user. The Operator is not responsible for the use court owners make of the information provided to them, and the user agrees that the disclosure of information to court owners is necessary for service provision.
privacy.tech_p1: The Operator may use various technologies to collect information from the user's mobile device and/or computer and about their activity on the website and/or application, including Cookies, SDKs, web beacons, pixels, log files, device identifiers, and similar technological means.
privacy.tech_p2: The Operator may automatically collect information from the user's mobile device, operating system, application, or browser when visiting the website and/or using the application. Such information may include, among other things, IP address, device type, browser type, browser language, access times, device identifiers, system data, communication provider, usage data, crash data, location data (subject to consent), content of non-deleted cookies, and referring website address.
privacy.security_p1: The Operator implements accepted and up-to-date information security systems and procedures on the website and/or application, designed to reduce the risks of unauthorized intrusion, prohibited use, data loss, or infringement of user privacy. However, these systems and procedures do not provide absolute security, and the Operator does not guarantee that its services, systems, or databases will be absolutely immune from unauthorized access, leaks, loss, or disruption of information.
privacy.security_p2: The Operator periodically reviews the information security measures of the website and/or application and makes changes, adjustments, and upgrades as necessary to maintain a reasonable and adequate level of information security. However, the Operator shall not be liable for any direct or indirect damage caused to the user in the event of information exposure, loss, or unauthorized use thereof, due to unauthorized intrusion by third parties, cyber events, malfunctions beyond the Operator's control, or as a result of any act or omission beyond its reasonable control.
privacy.access_title: Right to Access and Update Information
privacy.access_p1: Under the Privacy Protection Act, 5741-1981, every individual has the right to review information held about them in the Operator's database. A user who has reviewed their information and found it to be inaccurate, incomplete, unclear, or outdated may contact the database owner with a request to correct and/or update and/or delete the information held about them as described above.
privacy.access_p2: Such requests may be directed to the Operator via email at: support@rallypadel.com. It is hereby clarified that changes to the aforementioned contact details and the Operator's availability times may occur at the Operator's discretion, without prior notice, and the user shall have no claims against the Operator in this regard.
privacy.access_p3: If the information in the Operator's database is used for personally contacting the user, the user may, subject to applicable law, demand in writing that the information pertaining to them be deleted from the database and/or that its use for direct mailing purposes be discontinued.
privacy.changes_p1: The Operator may amend the provisions of this Privacy Policy from time to time, including to reflect changes in the service, the Operator's activities, legal requirements, or the manner of data processing. If material changes are made to provisions concerning the use of personal information provided by the user, a notice will be published on the website and/or application, at the Operator's discretion and subject to applicable law.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.content: Welcome to Rally. By using our app or site, you agree to these terms. Usage is governed by the laws of the State of Israel. Cancellations are subject to the Consumer Protection Law. Players are fully responsible for their health and safety during matches.

common.working_hard: We're working hard to bring this page to life. Stay tuned!

level_page.title: How Your Level Works
level_page.intro1: Your Rally level is a number between 1.0 and 7.0. It's assigned after a short skill assessment when you join, and it gets more accurate every time you play a match. The better we know your game, the better Rally works for you.
level_page.tier_d2_desc: Just picking up a racket — first steps on court
level_page.tier_d1_desc: Learning the basics, still building fundamentals
level_page.tier_c2_desc: Getting comfortable — consistent rallies, starting to feel the game
level_page.tier_c1_desc: Solid recreational player — knows the positions, reads the game
level_page.tier_b2_desc: Competitive club player — tactical awareness, reliable under pressure
level_page.tier_b1_desc: High club / low competitive — strong all-round game, tournament experience
level_page.tier_a2_desc: Competitive tournament player — technical and tactical
level_page.tier_a1_desc: Elite level — national or professional circuit
level_page.tiers_summary: Levels are grouped into three tiers: Bronze (1.0–2.9), Silver (3.0–3.9), and Gold (4.0+). Most recreational club players fall in the Silver range.
level_page.initial_title: How Your Initial Level Is Assigned
level_page.initial_intro: When you first join Rally, you complete a short skill assessment — 13 questions that take about 2 minutes. There are no right or wrong answers; the more honestly you respond, the more accurately your level reflects your actual game.
level_page.area1_desc: Your general sports background — how long you've played racket sports, how active you currently are, your physical fitness, and your natural sporting aptitude. This area carries more weight for players who are new to padel, since your athletic base gives the clearest signal.
level_page.area2_desc: How much padel you've actually played — your frequency, total volume, comfort on the glass, and your own honest assessment of your level. Players who've been playing for years will score differently here than those just starting out.
level_page.area3_desc: Whether you understand court positioning, how you'd handle key game situations, and your tournament history — how many competitions you've entered and how far you've gone. This pillar matters most for experienced players.
level_page.weighting_p1: The algorithm adapts to your profile. If you've never played padel before, your athletic background carries more weight — because there's simply more signal there. If you've never entered a tournament, that weight is redistributed across the other areas. The system always works with what it knows.
level_page.weighting_p2: Rally also runs consistency checks across your answers. If you rate yourself highly but show limited tactical knowledge, the self-assessment is moderated automatically. This makes the initial level more reliable for everyone.
level_page.evolves_title: How Your Level Evolves with Matches
level_page.evolves_p1: Your questionnaire level is your starting point — but it's not fixed. Every completed match in Rally feeds into your match rating, which updates after every game.
level_page.evolves_p2: After each match, the system compares the result against what was statistically expected, based on both teams' ratings. Beating a stronger team moves your level up more than beating a weaker one. Losing to a stronger team barely affects you — that outcome was expected.
level_page.evolves_p3: In doubles, the system accounts for your partner. If you're paired with a significantly stronger player, your individual contribution is weighted accordingly — so your rating reflects your own performance, not just whether your team won.
level_page.evolves_p4: As you play more matches, your match history gradually takes over from your initial assessment:
level_page.evolves_summary: After around 10–15 matches, your level is almost entirely driven by your actual results. The questionnaire gets you started — your game keeps you honest.
level_page.accuracy_p1: Your level is the primary signal Rally uses to recommend suitable partners and opponents.
level_page.accuracy_p2: When your level is accurate, Rally can surface players who are genuinely well-matched with you — close enough that games are competitive, far enough that you're always learning. For club owners, accurate levels mean better-organized open matches, fairer draws, and players who come back because they had a great game on court.
level_page.accuracy_p3: The more you play, the better your level reflects your real game — and the better Rally gets at connecting you with the right people.
